title: CompSelectionPayload
description: Server-side validation schema for the Comp Selection game-settings payload (POST /api/settings/comp-selection). NOTE: This schema enforces structural constraints only (non-empty array, unique items, enum values, integer bounds). Cross-field constraints — 'known IDs only' (requires validating against the current game catalogue) and 'weeklyLimit <= enabledIds.length' — cannot be expressed in draft-07 JSON Schema and must be enforced in application logic.

enabledIds.description: IDs of the competition games that the player has enabled. Must be non-empty and contain unique, non-empty strings. Whether each ID is a known game must be validated in application logic against the current game catalogue.

weeklyLimit.description: Maximum number of comps to draw each week. null or absent means no limit. Must also satisfy weeklyLimit <= enabledIds.length, which is enforced in application logic (not this schema).

filterCategory.description: Active category filter stored with the selection, or null for 'all'.
